title: Procure Space ETF (UFO) Surpasses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
description: Levittown, Pennsylvania--(Newsfile Corp. - May 27, 2026) - ProcureAM, LLC, issuer of the Procure Space ETF® (NASDAQ: UFO), today announced that the fund has surpassed $1 billion in assets under management (AUM), marking a milestone moment for both the firm and the rapidly expanding space economy investment category.
